General.Name: Zhongchang International Holdings Group Ltd
General.Description: Zhongchang International Holdings Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in property investment and leasing businesses in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company invests in commercial and residential properties; and leases commercial properties. It also offers project management services. The company was formerly known as Henry Group Holdings Limited and changed its name to Zhongchang International Holdings Group Limited in May 2018. Zhongchang International Holdings Group Limited was founded in 1991 and is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.

3.Name: Ms. Yunxiu  Gao
3.Title: General Manager of Human Resources & Administrative Department
